PropertyString.name: role
PropertyString.help: The L2TP element can be an access concentrator (LAC) or network server (LNS)
PropertyString.description: Role for L2TP element, access concentrator (LAC) or network server (LNS)

PropertyInt.name: setupRate
PropertyInt.help: The rate per second, at which to set up L2TP tunnels and PPP sessions
PropertyInt.description: Rate (per sec), for L2TP tunnel and PPP session setup

PropertyBoolean.name: enableThrottling
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked the setup rate will be throttled once the outstanding sessions reach the value of 'maxOutstandingSessions'
PropertyBoolean.description: Throttle setup rate once the outstanding sessions reach 'maxOutstandingSessions'

PropertyInt.name: maxOutstandingSessions
PropertyInt.help: The maximum number of sessions that may be outstanding while new sessions are being attempted if the outstanding sessions reach this limit, no more new sessions may be attempted until the outstanding sessions come up.
PropertyInt.description: Max. no. of sessions outstanding while new sessions are being setup

PropertyInt.name: teardownRate
PropertyInt.help: The rate per sec., at which to teardown up L2TP tunnels and PPP sessions
PropertyInt.description: The rate per sec for destroying L2TP tunnels and PPP sessions

PropertyInt.name: numSessions
PropertyInt.help: The number of sessions to establish
PropertyInt.description: The number of sessions to establish

PropertyNode.name: l2tp
PropertyNode.description: Element that contains l2tp specific properties

PropertyNode.name: pppL2tp
PropertyNode.description: Element that contains ppp specific properties
